---
title: "HGPResult"
generated: true
description: "Per-element hierarchical-GP fit output (HSGP engine, `'GS'` model)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.hgp`](../nitrix-stats-hgp.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:HGPResult -->
```python
class HGPResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:HGPResult -->
Per-element hierarchical-GP fit output (HSGP engine, `'GS'` model).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:HGPResult.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(coef: Float[Array, 'V p'], cov_unscaled: Float[Array, 'V p p'], theta: Float[Array, 'V K2'], log_mlik: Float[Array, 'V'], edf: Float[Array, 'V K'], dispersion: Float[Array, 'V'], kernel: str, engine: str, model: str, n_levels: Any, n_obs: int, rank: int, n_fixed: int, lo: float, hi: float, boundary: float) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:HGPResult -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `K2` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `K` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
